title: The Duck Pack
description: The Pack made for Duck Lovers. 🦆
body: This Resource Pack is made for people that love ducks made by someone that doesn't usually makes packs. This pack adds Duck Themed Name Dependent items. For example if you name a Diamond Sword "Ducker" it will look like a duck is poking out of the sword. ![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b966e4942db826ed0da20e53f91bf8c8ebe3f6a3.png)
